mcoop_controller_fix.title: MCoop Controller Fix
mcoop_controller_fix.description: The MCoop controller was experiencing issues with site name case handling and inconsistent routing. The site name was being stored as "MCOOP" (all uppercase) in the session, but the controller name is "MCoop" (mixed case). This inconsistency caused problems with theme handling and routing.

DailyPlanSystem.title: DailyPlan System - Project Documentation
DailyPlanSystem.description: Comprehensive planning and task management feature for Comserv. Multi-phase implementation: database schema, DBIC models, controller, views, testing, documentation. Includes navigation menu with anchor links to all sections. ApplicationTtTemplate.tt compliant with theme-compatible CSS classes.

2025-12-24_14-16-39_session_archive.title: TEMPORARY: Show ALL pages for debugging - REMOVE THIS LATER
2025-12-24_14-16-39_session_archive.description: **Chat Focus:** User reported broken documentation links in K3S_QUICK_REFERENCE.tt using incorrect format (`/Documentation/system/FILENAME.tt`). Zencoder analyzed the documentation system architecture, discovered flat namespace routing convention, fixed three broken links, and created comprehensive authoritative DOCUMENTATION_LINK_STANDARDS.md file. Updated documentation template with link formatting guidance for all future documentation agents.
